name: Row
description: Report data for each row. For example if RunReportRequest contains: ```none "dimensions": [ { "name": "eventName" }, { "name": "countryId" } ], "metrics": [ { "name": "eventCount" } ] ``` One row with 'in_app_purchase' as the eventName, 'JP' as the countryId, and 15 as the eventCount, would be: ```none "dimensionValues": [ { "value": "in_app_purchase" }, { "value": "JP" } ], "metricValues": [ { "value": "15" } ] ```

dimensionValues.description: List of requested dimension values. In a PivotReport, dimension_values are only listed for dimensions included in a pivot.

value.description: Value as a string if the dimension type is a string.

metricValues.description: List of requested visible metric values.

value.description: Measurement value. See MetricHeader for type.
